competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Marketing Copy & Features

## Main Marketing Message
"Command your craft" – GitHub's positioning emphasizes Copilot as "Your AI accelerator for every workflow, from the editor to the enterprise."

## Agent & Autonomous Features
- **Agents on GitHub**: "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously"
- Cloud agent capability enabling background task execution
- Agent mode with request limits (50/month on Free tier, unlimited on Pro+)

## Workspace & Context Features
- **Copilot Spaces**: "Turn Copilot into a project expert" by creating shared sources of truth with docs and repository context
- Multi-file awareness in editor context
- Access to "frameworks, languages, and dependencies" information

## Terminal & CLI Integration
- GitHub Copilot CLI for directing agents "using natural language" to "plan, build, and execute complex workflows"
- Works across GitHub, IDEs, terminals, and chat applications

## Development Workflow Features
- Code completion and inline suggestions
- Code review capabilities
- Chat assistance in editor and on GitHub.com
- Supports "IDE, CLI and GitHub Mobile" environments

## Multi-Model Support
Users can "choose from leading LLMs optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost" including Claude, GPT-5 mini, Haiku 4.5, and others.
competitors.content_hash:
# GitHub Copilot: Key Marketing Copy & Features

## Main Marketing Message
"Command your craft" – GitHub's positioning emphasizes Copilot as "Your AI accelerator

changes.description: 自主 Agent 任务分配：可将任务分配给 Copilot、Claude、Codex 等 agent，让其在后台自主规划和执行
changes.evidence: 「Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI = 快 session，在后台自主执行任务，逼近「AI session 与人 session 同协议」框架

changes.description: Copilot Spaces：为项目创建跨 repo + 文档的共享 context 源，成为团队共享知识节点
changes.evidence: 「Copilot Spaces: Turn Copilot into a project expert by creating shared sources of truth with docs and repository context」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #2：跨工具 artifact live context；锚点 #4：跨 session / 跨工具 artifact pull 的早期形态

changes.description: CLI 自然语言指令驱动 agent 执行复杂工作流，覆盖 GitHub、IDE、终端、移动端
changes.evidence: 「GitHub Copilot CLI for directing agents using natural language to plan, build, and execute complex workflows」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层延伸——CLI + 终端 = 不切焦点触发 agent session

changes.description: 多模型支持（Claude、GPT-5 mini、Haiku 4.5），向模型无关的 agent 平台定位演化
changes.evidence: 「choose from leading LLMs optimized for speed, accuracy, or cost including Claude, GPT-5 mini, Haiku 4.5, and others」

key_findings: Agents on GitHub 已支持跨 Copilot/Claude/Codex 的自主任务执行，后台运行能力明确
Copilot Spaces 构建跨 repo + 文档的项目级 context 共享，向 meee2 cross-tool artifact 方向靠拢

alerts.headline: Agents on GitHub 实现后台自主执行 + Copilot Spaces 构建跨工具 context 共享，双向逼近 meee2 核心锚点
alerts.evidence: 「Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously」；「Copilot Spaces: Turn Copilot into a project expert by creating shared sources of truth with docs and repository context」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点关注 Copilot Spaces 的跨工具 artifact 拉取能力是否演化为 live link（而非 snapshot）；若出现 session 级别的 human-AI 协作协议，威胁等级应升至 crit
